steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: Félix González-Torres is the subject of the previous sentence—one person (singular). The blank needs a pronoun that refers back to him.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: He is the only singular pronoun, correctly applying pronoun-antecedent agreement with González-Torres. The others violate pronoun-antecedent agreement: They all and Those are plural, Both implies multiple entities. That matches choice D — D is correct.
